title: MIP SCIM User Extension
description: MIP extension attributes for SCIM 2.0 User resources. Schema URI: urn:mip:scim:schemas:extension:Organization:2.0:User

role_ids.description: MIP role UUIDs assigned to this member within this organization

is_owner.description: Whether this user is the organization owner

joined_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the user joined this organization
